message:
fix(web): Fix MatrixRain canvas positioning breaking grid layout

The MatrixRain canvas was using Tailwind-style utility classes (fixed,
inset-0, z-0, pointer-events-none) that were never defined in the CSS.
This caused the canvas to have position: static instead of position: fixed,
making it participate in the CSS Grid layout.

With 4 grid items (canvas, header, main, footer) but only 3 grid rows
defined, the layout broke completely:
- Header expanded to 618px (should be 48px)
- Main content crushed to 48px (should fill viewport)
- Content columns showed 0 height

Fixed by replacing className utilities with inline styles.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
